title: RavenClaude plugin manifest
description: Validates plugins/*/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. Intentionally lenient — Claude Code itself defines the authoritative schema; this gate catches gross structural defects (missing name/description/version, malformed semver) before they reach a consumer.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case plugin name. Matches the directory under plugins/.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the plugin's value. Used in /plugin UI.

version.description: Semver. Must match the plugin's entry in marketplace.json (CI version-drift gate enforces).

requires.description: Compatibility constraints. The `ravenclaude-core` key is the conventional way for domain plugins to declare a minimum core version.
